item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 281100Z AUTO VRB05KT 9999 FEW036 SCT130 26/17 Q1021 TEMPO 4000 -TSRA SCT060 BKN090CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 280500Z 2806/2906 VRB04KT CAVOK PROB30 TEMPO 2806/2807 25010KT -RA BKN120TCU PROB40 TEMPO 2811/2820 30010KT -SHRA SCT060 BKN090CB PROB30 TEMPO 2812/2819 4000 -TSRA BECMG 2820/2823 33008KT
